notes: Remote head key (MLBHLIK6-1T) for LX/Sport turn-key trims; proximity smart key (ACJ932HK1210A) for EX/EX-L/Touring push-button-start trims. IC for smart key: 216J-HK1210A. Part numbers: 72147-T2A-A01 (no mem), 72147-T2A-A11 (D1), 72147-T2A-A21 (D2). Also compatible Honda Civic 2014-2015.

Shared FCC/part with 2013-2015 Accord. Turn-key start models only.

notes: LX trim typically remote head key (MLBHLIK6-1TA); EX and above use proximity smart key (KR5V2X). Emergency blade HON66 profile on smart key.

Remote head key. Transitions to smart key on some trims by 2016. Also fits HR-V 2016-2019.

notes: Shared FCC ID with 2008-2012 Accord Sedan. IC: 267T-5WK49308.
4- or 5-button proximity smart key depending on trim. Emergency HON66 blade included.
FCC KR5V44 and KR5T44 are interchangeable (same key). 5-button (Lock/Unlock/Hatch/Remote Start/Panic). Emergency HON66 blade. Also fits Passport 2019-2022 EXL/Touring/Elite.

notes: 5-button proximity smart key. No-PLG trim uses 4-button variant. Emergency HON66 blade included. IC: 7812D-TP4.
3-button remote head key (Lock/Unlock/Panic) for LX trim. EX/EXL trims use separate 5- or 6-button remote (FCC OUCG8D-399H-A, 313.8 MHz). IC: 850G-G8D380HA.

immobilizer: Philips Crypto 2 / Hitag2 (2011-2013); Philips Crypto 3 / Hitag3 (2014-2017 EX+)
notes: 3-button remote head key (OUCG8D-380H-A) for all trims 2011-2013 and LX trim 2014-2017. 5- or 6-button proximity smart key (KR5V1X) for EX/EX-L/SE/Touring trims 2014-2017 with push-button start. Smart key part numbers: 72147-TK8-A51 (no mem), 72147-TK8-A61 (D1), 72147-TK8-A81 (D2). Emergency blade HON66 included on smart key.
7-button smart key (incl. power doors). Emergency HON66 blade included.

notes: 7-button smart key. Part numbers vary by memory slot: -A51 (no mem), -A61 (D1), -A72 (D2). Emergency blade included.

notes: 3-button remote head key. IC: 850G-G8D380HA. Note: some 2007-2008 units may have Megamos 8E chip; verify by stamp on blade.
4-button smart key. Emergency HON66 blade included.
4-button smart key (Lock/Unlock/Remote Start/Panic). Emergency blade included. Part: -A51 no-mem, -A61 D1, -A71 D2. KR5T41 confirmed through at least 2024-2025 Ridgeline.
5-button smart key for EXL/Touring/Elite trims. KR5V44 and KR5T44 are interchangeable. Emergency blade included. Shared with Pilot 2019-2022.

notes: 5-button smart key. FCC KR5V41, confirmed 2019-2025 range for Passport; emergency blade included. Continental A2C18218401.

immobilizer: Megamos Crypto 8E or Philips Crypto 2 / Hitag2
notes: 3-button remote head key. Caution: blade with 'H' stamp = Megamos 8E chip (not clonable); blade with 'V' stamp = ID46 (clonable). Verify before ordering. chipClonable set to 'no' for safety (8E is the predominant variant per multiple sources).
Standalone transponder key. No remote head variant confirmed for base trims.

3- or 4-button proximity smart key (KR5V1X) for EX/EX-L/EX-LN trims with push-button start. 3-button remote head key (MLBHLIK6-1T, 35118-TY4-A00) for LX trim with turn-key ignition. Smart key IC: A2C80084900. Emergency blade included on smart key.
Standalone transponder key per UHS Hardware and eBay compatibility list for HO03-PT.

programmerHint: Xhorse VVDI Key Tool Max Pro
notes: 4-button smart key. Emergency blade included. Hybrid vehicle.
3- or 4-button flip key. Part numbers by memory: -316 (D1), -326 (D2), -306 (base). IC: 850G-N5F0602A1A.
KR5V1X = base/tech trim 4-button 313.8 MHz; KR580399900 = Advance trim 5-button 902 MHz. IC for KR5V1X: 7812D-V1X. Emergency blade included on both.

programmerHint: Xhorse VVDI Key Tool Max Pro
notes: 5-button smart key. IC: 7812D-BTP. Driver 1: 72147-TYA-C01, Driver 2: 72147-TYA-C11. No emergency key noted.
Shared FCC ID with MDX 2007-2013. 3-button flip key.

4-button proximity smart key. Also fits Acura ILX 2013-2015. Frequency: 315 MHz confirmed by keyinnovations.com and Amazon MADAT listing; one aftermarket source (autokeyhub) lists 313.8 MHz — minor conflict retained as verified given 2+ agreement on 315.
KR5V1X = base/tech 4-button 313.8 MHz; KR580399900 = Advance 5-button with engine start. Shared with MDX 2014-2020.
4-button smart key. IC: 7812D-T21. Emergency blade included.

programmerHint: Xhorse VVDI Key Tool Max Pro
notes: 4-button smart key. IC: 7812D-TP2. Emergency blade included. Memory 1: 72147-TJB-A21, Memory 2: 72147-TJB-A31.

Pre-facelift TLX. 4-button KR5V1X is 313.8 MHz — DO NOT use the 433.92 MHz KR5V21 from the 2018+ facelift here. Shares the 313.8 MHz key with ILX 2016-2018. KR580399900 = 5-button Advance with engine start (902 MHz, PN 72147-TZ3-A51/A61).

2018 facelift switched the 4-button key to KR5V21 / KR5V2X at 433.92 MHz (IC 7812D-V2X, PN 72147-TZ3-A21/A22/A31/A32) — NOT the pre-2018 KR5V1X 313.8 MHz. Wrong frequency will not pair. Shares the 433.92 MHz key with ILX 2019-2022. KR580399900 = 5-button Advance with engine start (902 MHz, PN 72147-TZ3-A51/A61).
4-button smart key. IC: 7812D-T21. Emergency blade included. Memory 1: -A01, Memory 2: -A11.

programmerHint: Xhorse VVDI Key Tool Max Pro
notes: 5-button smart key with remote start and trunk. IC: 7812D-BTP. Shared FCC with MDX 2022+.
4-button proximity smart key. Shared FCC with RDX 2013-2015. 315 MHz confirmed by keyinnovations.com.

Pre-facelift ILX. 4-button KR5V1X is 313.8 MHz — DO NOT use the 433.92 MHz KR5V21 from the 2019+ facelift here. Shares the 313.8 MHz key with TLX 2015-2017 and RLX 2016-2018. KR580399900 = 5-button Premium/A-Spec with engine start (902 MHz, PN 72147-TZ3-A51/A61).

2019 facelift switched the 4-button key to KR5V21 / KR5V2X at 433.92 MHz (IC 7812D-V2X, PN 72147-TZ3-A21/A22/A31/A32) — NOT the pre-2019 KR5V1X 313.8 MHz. Wrong frequency will not pair. Shares the 433.92 MHz key with TLX 2018-2020. KR580399900 = 5-button Premium/A-Spec with engine start (902 MHz, PN 72147-TZ3-A51/A61), carried over from the earlier ILX.

programming: Professional locksmith or dealer required; separate chip programming
notes: 4-button flip key (Lock/Unlock/Trunk/Panic). IC: 2500A-HLIK-1T. Also fits Acura TL 2009-2014 and ZDX 2010-2013.
